title: Fauna Components Releases New Front Cargo System and XL Cargo Cage
content:
Vancouver, BC based Fauna Components expands its lineup with the addition of the Handlebar Support and accompanying Kitty Collar, as well as an XL version of their stainless steel cargo cage…

Handlebar Support Quick Hits

  • 5mm Powder-Coated Stainless Steel
  • Sizes: Short (stems under 60mm), Long (stems 60mm and longer)
  • Weight 133g (short), 153g (long)
  • Tested to 6kg; 3–4kg recommended for everyday off-road use
  • Designed for threadless 1-1/8″ steerers
  • Made in Vancouver with imported parts
  • Accessory Mount Standard 3-bolt M5 bottle mount (M5 threaded, 64mm spacing) – Plated Steel Rivet Nut

Installation is as simple as swapping out the spacers below your stem. The simple and effective support provides rigidity and helps eliminate swaying front bags while keeping them off your head tube.

The support comes in two sizes. The short version is designed for stems under 60 mm (like most mountain bikes), while the long version suits stems 60 mm and longer (road and gravel bikes). For many riders, either size will work — it mostly comes down to personal preference and how much clearance you want between the bag and the headtube. The short version is a little stiffer under heavier loads.

Kitty Collar Quick Hits

  • Material: 6061-T6 Matte Black Anodized, Stainless Steel Bolt and Pin
  • Compatible with 1-1/8″ steerer tube, Fauna Handlebar Bag Support/Cradle
  • Stack Required 8mm
  • Origin Made in Vancouver with imported parts
  • Weight: 15g

This CNC aluminium “Kitty Collar” clamps to a 1-1/8″ steerer and keys into the Fauna handlebar bag support, preventing it from rotating or shifting under load. Already included with every Fauna Cargo Cradle — also available separately as an upgrade.

Xl Cage Quick Hits

  • Body: 3mm 304 Stainless Steel Black Powdercoat
  • Foot: 5mm 304 Stainless Steel Black Powdercoat
  • Weight: 185g Body, 88g foot
  • Includes 1x Cage Body, 1x Foot, 3x M5x16 Bolts, 3x TPU Spacers
  • Origin Made in Vancouver with imported parts
  • Weight Capacity tested up to 6 kgs.

The Fauna XL Cargo Cage is a super-sized version of their original cargo cage. It’s excellent for carrying huge dry-bags on your fork, with plenty of support.

author: spencer harding
